category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Cambodia.

title.en: China-to-Cambodia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入柬埔寨：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入柬埔寨：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Cambodia ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) and EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) requirements, IEC 61851 safety standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector requirements, EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) grid-connection requirements, IEC 61000 EMC and OCPP interoperability expectations, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与柬埔寨ISC（柬埔寨标准研究院）和EAC（柬埔寨电力管理局）要求、IEC 61851安全标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口要求、EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）并网要求、IEC 61000 EMC及OCPP互操作预期，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與柬埔寨ISC（柬埔寨標準研究院）和EAC（柬埔寨電力管理局）要求、IEC 61851安全標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口要求、EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）併網要求、IEC 61000 EMC及OCPP互操作預期，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Cambodia, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC), since Cambodia's nascent IEC-aligned infrastructure is physically incompatible with GB/T connectors; IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence required or anticipated by EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) coordination and project owners, as ISC adopts IEC standards; EDC grid-connection approval for installations connected to Electricité du Cambodge supply; IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; and OCPP-based back-office interoperability for networked public chargers. Cambodia operates on 230/400 V, 50 Hz — closely aligned with China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, but input-voltage range and thermal design for tropical ambient conditions should be confirmed. The Cambodia EV market is nascent and centred on Phnom Penh; government EV roadmap initiatives are progressing but detailed mandatory conformity assessment routes for EVSE had not been confirmed from single official published regulations as of 2026-06-14. Exporters must verify current ISC conformity requirements, EAC coordination procedures, and EDC grid-connection rules with qualified professionals before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入柬埔寨时，已确认的实务差距包括：接口硬件须从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流），因为柬埔寨新兴IEC体系基础设施在物理上与GB/T接口不兼容；由于ISC采纳IEC标准，EAC（柬埔寨电力管理局）协调及项目业主要求或预期提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据；接入EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）电网的安装须取得并网审批；须提供IEC 61000系列EMC证据；联网公共充电桩须满足OCPP后台互操作要求。柬埔寨电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V、50 Hz基线相近，但应确认输入电压范围和热带环境下的热设计。柬埔寨电动汽车市场处于起步阶段，主要集中在金边；政府电动汽车路线图正在推进，但截至2026年6月14日，未能从单一官方发布法规确认EVSE的详细强制合格评定路径。出口商在出货前须与合格专业人士核实现行ISC合规要求、EAC协调程序和EDC并网规则。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入柬埔寨時，已確認的實務差距包括：接口硬件須從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流），因為柬埔寨新興IEC體系基礎設施在物理上與GB/T接口不兼容；由於ISC採納IEC標準，EAC（柬埔寨電力管理局）協調及項目業主要求或預期提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據；接入EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）電網的安裝須取得併網審批；須提供IEC 61000系列EMC證據；聯網公共充電樁須滿足OCPP後台互操作要求。柬埔寨電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V、50 Hz基線相近，但應確認輸入電壓範圍和熱帶環境下的熱設計。柬埔寨電動汽車市場處於起步階段，主要集中在金邊；政府電動汽車路線圖正在推進，但截至2026年6月14日，未能從單一官方發布法規確認EVSE的詳細強制合格評定路徑。出口商在出貨前須與合格專業人士核實現行ISC合規要求、EAC協調程序和EDC併網規則。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ISC scope determination, EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) approval, EDC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Cambodia conformity assessment rules, EAC coordination requirements, EDC grid-connection procedures, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ISC适用范围裁定、EAC（柬埔寨电力管理局）批准、EDC并网审批、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行柬埔寨合格评定规则、EAC协调要求、EDC并网程序、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ISC適用範圍裁定、EAC（柬埔寨電力管理局）批准、EDC併網審批、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行柬埔寨合格評定規則、EAC協調要求、EDC併網程序、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
